name: molcrafts
description: Claude Code-first workflows and maintenance tooling for MolCrafts scientific software projects.

plugins.name: mol
plugins.description: Project workflow toolkit — 29 skills + 20 single-axis agents organized around the planner→generator→evaluator harness pattern. Adapts per project via mol_project frontmatter.

plugins.name: molexp
plugins.description: molexp data-workspace tooling — adopt legacy experiment directories into Workspace → Project → Experiment → Run.

plugins.name: molq
plugins.description: molq job lifecycle via molmcp — list/status/logs, opt-in submit and cancel for local/SLURM/PBS/LSF.

plugins.name: mol-plugin
plugins.description: Maintenance toolkit for the MolCrafts marketplace — scaffold skills, unified check (structure + content + install smoke), and release.
